title.ko: 극장, 서커스 또는 그 유사한 장치; 마술용 설비 또는 그 유사물
title.en: DEVICES FOR THEATRES, CIRCUSES, OR THE LIKE; CONJURING APPLIANCES OR THE LIKE

definition.ko: 무대 또는 써커스 장치 A63J1/00 ~ A63J5/00 그 밖의 가시적 오락 A63J13/00 ~ A63J19/00, A63J23/00 그 밖의 오락 A63J9/00, A63J11/00, A63J23/00 연예자를 위한 장치 A63J7/00, A63J21/00

title.en: Scenery; Curtains; Other decorations; Means for moving same
Equipment for, or arrangement of, circuses or arenas
Auxiliaries for producing special effects on stages, or in circuses or arenas
Arrangements for making stage effects; Auxiliary stage appliances
Arrangements for making visible or audible the words spoken
Apparatus for raising or lowering persons
Centrifugal tracks, loop-the-loops or the like
Panoramas, dioramas, stereoramas, or the like
Peep-shows, e.g. raree-shows; Kaleidoscopic or other opalescence exhibitions
Puppet, marionette, or shadow shows or theatres
Conjuring appliances; Auxiliary apparatus for conjurers
Equipment specially adapted for cinemas (cinematographic projection means G03B)
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
